strengths: Demonstrated smooth bilateral instrument control during outbound transfers
Maintained stable camera positioning throughout the visible portion of the task
Showed good coordination between both hands during object manipulation
weaknesses: Failed to complete the full task cycle - objects remained on the right side without return transfers
Did not demonstrate the complete bilateral transfer sequence required for task completion
Time management issues led to incomplete task within the allowed timeframe

drills.name: Complete cycle rehearsal
drills.description: Practice full peg transfer cycles focusing on both outbound and return transfers without time pressure to establish the complete movement pattern.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the full task cycle.

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Perform 15 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, emphasizing stable release and regrasp angles.

drills.name: Timed completion drill
drills.description: Complete full peg transfer cycles with a 2-minute target, building speed while maintaining task completion.
drills.targets_weakness: Time management issues led to incomplete task.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on completing the full task cycle consistently before pursuing faster times. Your bilateral coordination shows promise, but task completion must be prioritized over speed.
